fact.fact: Onboarding draft ordering is client-local until final workspace/runtime-scoped create
fact.human_doc_phrase: Onboarding draft ordering is client-local until final workspace/runtime-scoped create

source_refs.required_phrase: persisted draft state or workspace-less create

receives only saved assignment/runtime snapshots after final create and assignment
